view.title: Validate explicit UC need #5

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 5 blocked
blocks.message: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for seasonal adjustment in hiding availability.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for seasonal adjustment in hiding availability.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the seasonal adjustment feature, specifically whether the system hides less during slow periods. However, the evidence provided does not include concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this functionality. The only related information indicates that the coach reduces hiding to 10% during December, but it does not demonstrate how this is implemented or verified, leading to an inconclusive status.
